project_context.vibe: Worn fantasy cartographer's workshop + modern professional usability. Tactile, mysterious yet highly functional.

headings.usage: Campaign titles, major panel headers, empty states.

body.usage: Tooltips, UI labels, properties panel, buttons.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Full-bleed canvas with floating UI panels (Figma/Procreate style).

components.top_bar: Floating top-center or top-left. Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-surface_floating border border-white/10. Contains Home, Campaign Name, Export.
components.tool_dock: Floating middle-left. Vertical layout. Compact spacing (gap-2, p-2). Rounded-2xl.
components.properties_panel: Floating right, full height minus margins (top-4 right-4 bottom-4). Width: w-80. Houses Layers, Brush Settings, AI Redraw inputs.
components.nested_map_sheet: Shadcn Sheet sliding from right. Dark overlay over canvas.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use Tailwind defaults but favor p-4 to p-6 inside panels for breathing room. Tools use tight p-2.

ui_components.buttons: Flat solid for primary. Glassy/outline for secondary. border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/5.
ui_components.inputs: Shadcn Input. bg-black/40 border border-white/10 focus:border-amber-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-600.
ui_components.cards: Campaign dashboard uses Bento grid. Images with bg-black/50 overlay. hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform.
ui_components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react. Duotone or Fill weight for active tools, Regular for inactive.

features_implementation.campaign_dashboard: Grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8). Cards have background images from campaigns, huge Cormorant Garamond titles.
features_implementation.map_canvas: Wrap the main map image in react-zoom-pan-pinch TransformWrapper. The image should act as the base layer.
features_implementation.drawing_toolkit: Overlay an HTML5 canvas element perfectly aligned with the base image inside the TransformComponent. Use basic canvas 2D context for freehand, shapes, and text.
features_implementation.ai_region_redraw: Tool mode: user drags a rectangle. This shows a localized floating popover (absolute positioned near the rect) with a Textarea for prompt and model selector (Nano Banana / GPT Image 1). On submit, simulate generation and paste the new image chunk onto the canvas.
features_implementation.pins_and_nested_maps: Tool mode: click to drop a pin. Pins are absolute-positioned React elements over the map. Clicking a pin opens the Properties Panel or a Sheet to view/edit the 'Linked Map' thumbnail and description.

interaction_and_motion.tool_selection: Active tool gets bg-white/10 and text-amber-500.
interaction_and_motion.hover_states: All interactables must have hover:bg-white/5 or similar. Text color transitions.
interaction_and_motion.canvas_navigation: Spacebar+Drag to pan (simulated via react-zoom-pan-pinch panning rules), scroll to zoom.

dashboard_hero.description: Background image for the campaign selection dashboard. Darken with overlay.

demo_world_map.description: Default placeholder for a newly opened world map.

demo_nested_map.description: Thumbnail image showing a linked tabletop dungeon map inside a pin's details.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text passes WCAG AA against the dark #1E1B18 backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY. Add data-testid to all interactive elements. Examples: 'tool-brush', 'campaign-card', 'ai-redraw-prompt'.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup standard React App with Tailwind + Shadcn. Use ONLY .js files (no .tsx).
3. Build the Campaign Dashboard first (grid of campaigns).
4. Build the Map Editor Canvas: Use react-zoom-pan-pinch for the pan/zoom wrapper.
5. Inside the canvas, layer the Map Image, the Drawing Canvas (HTML5 canvas), and the Pins layer (React elements).
6. Build floating UI panels (Tool dock, Top bar, Properties panel) OUTSIDE the transform wrapper so they stay fixed on screen.
7. Implement standard drawing logic in the canvas (brush, rect, circle).
8. Implement AI Redraw: Draw a selection box, show prompt input, mock the AI return with a colored box or an overlay image.
